items.question: What is the customer name?
items.custom_prompt: What is the name of the client?

items.question: Specify the type of testing being conducted
items.custom_prompt: Specify the type of testing being conducted (e.g., 'Safety Testing', 'EMC Testing', 'Performance Testing') followed by the product type and list up to 3 model numbers. Format: 'Testing Type - Product Type - Model1, Model2, Model3'

items.question: What's the REPORT NUMBER
items.custom_prompt: What's the REPORT NUMBER

items.question: What's the Issue Date
items.custom_prompt: What's the Issue Date?

items.question: What's the revised Date?
items.custom_prompt: What's the revised Date?
Enter the total number of pages in this report (numeric value only, e.g., '7' or '12')

items.question: What's the Issue Date?
items.custom_prompt: What's the Issue Date

items.question: What's the REPORT NUMBER
items.custom_prompt: What's the REPORT NUMBER? If not found, give the response as 'Not Found'

items.question: What's the Project Number?
items.custom_prompt: What's the Project Number? Remove anything after 'MPK' including 'MPK'and append a 'G' in the start

items.question: What's the name of the contact person  of the Client
items.custom_prompt: What's the name of the contact person of the Client. Incase there is no answer, return 'Not Found'
Enter the phone number of the applicant contact person including area code (e.g., '(555) 123-4567' or '+1-555-123-4567'). Incase there is no answer, return 'Not Found'
Enter the full legal name of the applicant/client company (e.g., 'ABC Technologies Inc.' or 'XYZ Manufacturing Corporation')
Enter the fax number of the applicant contact person including area code (e.g., '(555) 123-4568'). Incase there is no answer, return 'Not Found'

items.question: What's the City, State and Zip of the Client's Address?
items.custom_prompt: What's the Street Address of the Client
Enter the email address of the applicant contact person (e.g., 'john.smith@company.com'). Incase there is no answer, return 'Not Found'
Enter the city, state/province, and ZIP/postal code of the applicant company (e.g., 'Plano, TX 75074' or 'Toronto, ON M5H 2N2')

Specify the type of evaluation being conducted. Choose one: 'ETL Listing' for North American certification, 'CB' for international CB scheme certification, or specify another evaluation type (e.g., 'Field Evaluation', 'Special Inspection')
Enter the general product type or category being evaluated (e.g., 'Industrial Control Panel', 'Heating Equipment', 'Power Supply', 'Temperature Controller')
List all model numbers covered by this evaluation, separated by commas (e.g., 'Model ABC-100, ABC-200, ABC-300')

items.question: Enter the full name of the primary contact person at the applicant/client company (e.g., 'John Smith' or 'Sarah Johnson')
items.custom_prompt: Enter the full name of the primary contact person at the applicant/client company (e.g., 'John Smith' or 'Sarah Johnson')

Enter the complete standard reference(s) used for this evaluation including title, number, edition, and date. Format: 'Standard Number: Standard Title, Edition/Date' (e.g., 'UL 508A: Industrial Control Panels, 3rd Edition 2013' or 'IEC 60950-1: Information Technology Equipment - Safety, 2nd Edition 2005'). If multiple standards, list each on a new line

Specify which stage(s) of the evaluation process identified the non-conformances. Choose: 'during our evaluation (Stage 1)', 'during our testing (Stage 2)', or 'during our evaluation (Stage 1) and testing (Stage 2)'

Specify the type of deliverable document that will be provided. Choose: 'CB Test Report' for CB scheme, 'ETL CDR' (Construction Details Report) for ETL listing, or specify another deliverable type (e.g., 'Field Evaluation Report', 'Technical Assessment')

items.key: <will be sent under separate cover/attached to this letter>
items.custom_prompt: Specify how the draft deliverable will be provided. Choose: 'will be sent under separate cover' if sending separately, or 'attached to this letter' if including with this letter report

Specify what is being evaluated. Choose the most appropriate: 'product' for a single item, 'products' for multiple items, 'system' for an integrated system, or specify another appropriate term (e.g., 'equipment', 'assembly', 'installation')

Specify what type of samples or documentation are needed. Choose: 'additional' if new samples/documents are required, 'modified' if changes to existing samples/documents are needed, or 'additional/modified' if both may apply

Specify when the non-conformances were identified. If found during initial documentation review, keep as 'Initial Documentation Review'. If found during another phase, replace with the appropriate phase name (e.g., 'Physical Inspection', 'Performance Testing', 'Final Evaluation')
Extract the project number from the document. This is typically found in the header or introductory section and follows a format like 'Project No. XXXXX'
Determine if repeat testing is required based on the evaluation results. Fill with 'and conduct repeat testing, if required' if testing issues were identified, otherwise leave blank
Select 'will' if modified samples or additional documentation WILL be required for follow-up project based on the non-conformances identified

items.question: Insert page number reference '4' or current page number where this section appears
items.custom_prompt: Insert page number reference '4' or current page number where this section appears

items.question: Extract the Project Manager's name and email from the document. Format as: 'Name via email@domain.com'. Look for contact information in the document header or signature sections
items.custom_prompt: Extract the Project Manager's name and email from the document. Format as: 'Name via email@domain.com'. Look for contact information in the document header or signature sections

items.question: Completed By
items.custom_prompt: Mention name of the person in the field 'Tested by (name, function, signature):'

items.question: What is the name of the reviewer?
items.custom_prompt: Extract the name of the person who reviewed this evaluation report. Look for reviewer information in signature sections or document metadata

items.question: Extract the title/role of the reviewer from the document. Common titles include 'Senior Engineer', 'Project Manager', 'Technical Reviewer', etc.
items.custom_prompt: Extract the title/role of the reviewer from the document. Common titles include 'Senior Engineer', 'Project Manager', 'Technical Reviewer', etc.
